style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of a chaotic sprawl of mismatched old buildings on one side being reorganized into a small set of clean, identical modern modular buildings on the other, all resting on one shared foundation. A sense of hundreds of redundant structures becoming a few reusable ones. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial illustration of a chaotic sprawl of mismatched old buildings on one side being reorganized into a small set of clean, identical modern modular buildings on the other, all resting on one shared foundation. A sense of hundreds of redundant structures becoming a few reusable ones. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
